response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior full-stack engineer with strong TDD, craftsmanship, and polyglot background, but the resume shows minimal hands-on work with the core stack required for this role. Java appears only briefly (robotic arms, mobile orchestration) and there is no evidence of Kotlin, Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate, deep JVM internals, or IDE/language-tooling development. The closest adjacent experience is C/C++ work on NI LabWindows/CVI a decade ago. Without demonstrated JVM ecosystem depth, this is a weak match for a Senior JVM/IDE tooling role.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development)
Prior experience contributing to an IDE product (NI LabWindows/CVI in C/C++)
Broad polyglot experience across backend, frontend, embedded, and developer tooling
concerns: No demonstrated Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience
Limited and dated Java exposure; no Kotlin experience listed
No evidence of deep JVM internals or modern language-tooling work

key_factors.factor: Lack of Spring/JVM enterprise framework experience
